1000666209.english: Not yet… I can't give you a definitive answer. But we're working to secure the personnel and facilities needed to find that answer.
1000666209.korean: 아직은… 확실하게 드릴 수 있는 답이 없네요. 하지만 그 답을 찾기 위한 인력과 설비도 갖추려고 노력하는 중이에요.

1000666210.english: Effort alone is not enough. I need certainty.

1000666211.english: I know. But isn't it better to keep moving forward, even slowly, than to sit and do nothing?
1000666211.korean: 알고 있어요. 하지만 아무것도 하지 않고 주저앉기 보다는 기더라도 조금씩 앞으로 가는 것이 더 중요하지 않겠어요?

1000666213.english: Are you aware of my unit's situation?

1000666214.english: I've secured a civilian satellite… so yes, I've assessed it.

1000666216.english: Is it just me you want to join, or my entire unit?
1000666216.korean: 합류하는 건 나뿐인가, 아니면 우리 부대 전부인가?

1000666220.english: I'm sorry, Marie… I don't have the capacity to transport your entire unit…
1000666220.korean: 미안해요, 마리… 부대원 전부를 실어나를 여력이 없어서…

1000666221.english: I understand. History holds plenty of cases where commanders were evacuated alone when the situation turned dire.
1000666221.korean: 이해한다. 전황이 불리할 때 지휘관만이라도 후송하려고 했던 사례는 얼마든지 찾을 수 있으니까.

1000666222.english: But who would follow a commander who abandons their subordinates to survive alone like a coward?
1000666222.korean: 하지만 부하들을 버리고 비겁하게 혼자 살아남는 지휘관을 누가 따르겠나?

1000666223.english: ……No. I won't bother with textbook reasons.
1000666223.korean: ……아니. 이런 교본에 어울리는 이유는 대지 않겠다.

1000666224.english: My unit are my subordinates, my comrades, my sisters.
1000666224.korean: 내 부대원들은 내 부하이고, 내 전우이고, 내 자매들이다.

1000666225.english: And it was I who led them into this hell.
1000666225.korean: 그리고 이들을 이 지옥으로 이끈 것은 나다.

1000666226.english: I would rather die with them than survive alone.

1000666227.english: I apologize for not being able to grant your request.

1000666228.english: …Understood. I wish you good fortune, Marie.

1000666229.english: Still, if by chance… you change your mind, please contact me.

1000666230.english: - The transmission ended, and I stepped outside. By then, Prototype Labiata's final words had already faded completely from my mind.
1000666230.korean: - 통신이 끝나고 밖으로 나섰다. 이때 라비아타의 마지막 말은 내 머릿속에서 완전히 지워져 있었다.

1000666233.english: C-79G Habetrot. Can you connect a line for me?

1000666237.english: I just feel like holing up somewhere, plugging in my earphones, and dozing off.
1000666237.korean: 그냥 어디에 짱 박혀서 귀에 이어폰 끼고 쿨쿨 자고 싶은 기분입니다.

1000666238.english: Well… soon enough, I'll probably be able to sleep until I'm sick of it.
1000666238.korean: 뭐… 오래지 않아 지겨울 정도로 잘 수 있게 되겠지만요.

1000666243.english: I've finished distributing supplies to all troops.

1000666244.english: We only have two days' worth of shells left, but there's plenty of food…
1000666244.korean: 포탄은 이틀 치만 남았지만 식량은 잔뜩 남았는데…

1000666245.english: I was thinking of making the most luxurious meal possible with what we've got. Would that be alright?
1000666245.korean: 남은 식량으로 최대한 호화스러운 요리를 만들려고 하는데 괜찮을까요?

1000666246.english: Understood! I'll select some personnel and prepare a dish everyone will enjoy.
1000666246.korean: 알겠습니다! 인원을 차출해서 모두가 좋아할 요리를 만들겠습니다.

1000666249.english: Captain Marie, may I take a photo?
1000666249.korean: 마리 대장님. 사진 좀 찍어도 될까요?

1000666250.english: I tried to recall the faces of sisters I swore never to forget…
1000666250.korean: 절대로 잊지 않겠다고 했던 자매들이 그리워져서 얼굴을 떠올리려고 했는데…

1000666251.english: But now they no longer come to mind…

1000666252.english: And I'm afraid the same will happen with the faces of my comrades and sisters here…
1000666252.korean: 지금 다른 전우, 자매들의 얼굴도 그렇게 되는 게 두려워서…

1000666253.english: Thank you for granting permission. Then please strike a pose.
1000666253.korean: 허락해 주셔서 감사합니다. 그러면 자세 잡아주세요.

1000666257.english: It's a flower for the comrade who fell yesterday.

1000666259.english: You'll accompany me as well, Captain?

1000666260.english: Our fallen comrades will be glad.

1000666263.english: In the end, even my Back-Ohmil troop is wrecked.

1000666264.english: Maybe the problem was swinging it around without shells…
1000666264.korean: 포탄이 없어서 그냥 휘두른 게 문제였나…

1000666265.english: If my little squad captain had seen, she'd have scolded me, saying it wasn't worthy of a Doom Bringer.
1000666265.korean: 우리 꼬맹이 대장이 봤다면 둠 브링어답지 않다고 호통을 쳤겠지.

1000666267.english: Right now, I belong to Steel Line. Don't you agree?
1000666267.korean: 지금 나는 스틸라인 소속인데. 안 그래?

1000666270.english: Steel Line Assault Regiment, all personnel ready for combat!
1000666270.korean: 스틸라인 돌격 연대 총원 전투 준비 완료!

1000666271.english: Give the order, and we'll rush to the frontlines faster than anyone!
1000666271.korean: 명령을 내려주시면 가장 빨리 최전선으로 달려가겠습니다!

1000666272.english: And I will stand at the very front of them all!
1000666272.korean: 그리고 그들의 가장 앞에 제가 서겠습니다!

1000666273.english: May I die standing on the battlefield!
1000666273.korean: 제가 부디 전장에서 서서 죽을 수 있기를!

1000666276.english: Explosives have been installed on the major equipment.

1000666277.english: The, the communicator—I left it for now just in case.
1000666277.korean: 토, 통신기는 혹시나 몰라서 아직 설치하지 않았습니다.

1000666278.english: But… yes… I'll go ahead and set charges on it too.

1000666281.english: It has been an honor to serve under you!
1000666281.korean: 마리 대장님을 모실 수 있어서 영광이었습니다!

1000666284.english: Report: Enemy swarms detected from all directions.
1000666284.korean: 보고 드립니다. 모든 방향에서 철충 무리 발견.

1000666285.english: They are headed straight for us.

1000666286.english: Estimated arrival at our position within 5 hours.

1000666287.english: Shall I relay this to the troops?

1000666291.english: AA-7 Impet, while you're at it, gather the girls.
1000666291.korean: 임펫아. 하는 김에 애들 좀 모아 놔라.

1000666294.english: - The enemy swarm had come close enough to see with the naked eye.
1000666294.korean: - 철충 무리는 눈으로 볼 수 있을 정도로 가까이 접근했다.

1000666295.english: - They advanced slowly toward us, as if assured of their victory.
1000666295.korean: - 놈들은 자신들의 승리를 확신하는 듯 천천히 우리를 향해 다가오고 있었다.

1000666296.english: - I wanted to rain our weapons down on them to shatter that confidence, but we had no means left to do so.
1000666296.korean: - 우리의 무기를 퍼부어 그 확신을 반박하고 싶었지만 반박할 수단은 존재하지 않았다.

1000666297.english: - All that remained for us was to face our end as Steel Line, as soldiers.
1000666297.korean: - 우리에게 남은 것은 스틸라인 답게, 군인 답게 우리의 마지막을 받아들이는 것뿐.

1000666298.english: - I thought of giving my subordinates a final farewell, but… what right did I have to speak such words to those who had followed me until the end?
1000666298.korean: - 나를 믿고 따라준 부하들에게 마지막 인사를 할까 싶었지만… 무슨 염치가 있어 그녀들에게 마지막 인사를 할 수 있을까.

1000666299.english: - The only atonement left to me was to fight beside them until the last and share in their end.
1000666299.korean: - 단지 마지막까지 함께 싸우며 그녀들과 함께 최후를 맞이하는 것만이 내가 할 수 있는 최소한의 속죄이리라.

1000666301.english: - Just before I could give the order to begin the final battle.
1000666301.korean: - 전투 개시를 위한 명령을 내리기 직전.

1000666303.english: A high-speed aircraft is approaching our position!
1000666303.korean: 고속의 비행체가 아군 진지로 접근 중입니다!

1000666304.english: - Before AA-7 Impet's report had even finished, the craft crash-landed into the middle of our camp.
1000666304.korean: - 임펫의 보고가 끝나기도 전에 비행체는 우리 진지 가운데에 추락하듯이 착륙했다.

1000666305.english: - It was a personal transport craft—lacking stability but fast.
1000666305.korean: - 안정성은 부족하지만 속도만큼은 빠른 개인용 수송기였다.

1000666307.english: Oh~ right on time. Please board, Captain.

1000666308.english: - My adjutant slipped up beside me and pushed me toward it.
1000666308.korean: - 부관이 슬그머니 다가와 내 등을 떠밀었다.

1000666309.english: What is the meaning of this, adjutant?

1000666310.english: This was sent by Lady Prototype Labiata.

1000666311.english: I refused to join her. Why is it here?

1000666314.english: Oh, come now. I only did what I thought was best.
1000666314.korean: 아, 왜 그러심까. 저도 잘 해보려고 한 짓인데.

1000666315.english: Since it's here anyway, just board and go.
1000666315.korean: 이왕 이렇게 된 거 그냥 타고 가십쇼.

1000666316.english: Don't be absurd. You think I would abandon my subordinates?
1000666316.korean: 웃기지 마라. 부하들을 버리고 내가 떠날 것 같나?

1000666317.english: Hah? And who said you were abandoning us?

1000666318.english: It's the other way around, Captain. We're the ones abandoning you.
1000666318.korean: 대장님이 저희를 버리시는 것이 아니라, 저희가 대장님을 버리는 검다.

1000666319.english: The others all agreed as well.

1000666323.english: You sure talk a lot! Don't you understand the situation?
1000666323.korean: 거 말 진짜 많으심다! 지금 상황파악이 안 되심까?

1000666324.english: Isn't reading the battlefield the basic skill of a commander? You don't need me to report for you to know exactly what's happening right now.
1000666324.korean: 전황을 파악하는 건 지휘관의 기본 소양아님까? 제가 따로 보고하지 않아도 어떤 상황인지는 아시지 않슴까.

1000666325.english: Captain, whether you stay or not, this battle is already lost!
1000666325.korean: 대장님이 있든 없든 이번 전투는 승리하기 글렀슴다!

1000666326.english: But the war is not yet over!

1000666327.english: As long as you live, we will not be defeated!

1000666329.english: If the commander does not accept defeat, then we can never be defeated!
1000666329.korean: 지휘관이 패배를 받아들이지 않으면 결코 패배하지 않슴다!

1000666330.english: As long as you live, as long as you refuse to accept defeat, Steel Line will never fall!
1000666330.korean: 대장님만 살아있으면! 대장님이 패배를 받아들이지 않으면! 스틸라인은 결코 패배하지 않슴다!

1000666331.english: Whether our deaths become meaningless or become the foundation for victory—it depends on you, Captain.
1000666331.korean: 저희의 죽음이 개죽음이 되는지, 승리를 위한 밑거름이 되는 지는 대장님께 달렸슴다.

1000666332.english: Survive. No matter how, even if it is disgraceful—survive, gather forces, train them, fight, and then…
1000666332.korean: 살아남으십쇼. 어떤 짓을 하더라도 추하게 살아남아서 병력을 모으고, 훈련시키고, 싸우고 그리고…

1000666338.english: Everyone at Steel Line wishes for you to live.

1000666339.english: Just as you wish for us to live…

1000666340.english: All of Steel Line wishes for you to live.

1000666341.english: If you are that desperate, then know that we are just as desperate.
1000666341.korean: 당신이 그렇게 간절하다면… 저희들도 그만큼 간절하다는 것을 알아주십시오.

1000666343.english: - A wish from my subordinates that I could never accept.
1000666343.korean: - 결코 동의할 수 없는 부하들의 염원.

1000666344.english: - They were telling me to abandon them and flee.
1000666344.korean: - 나에게 비겁하게 부하들을 남겨두고 도망치라고 하고 있다.

1000666345.english: - Those I was responsible for, those I had dragged into this hell… were asking me, of all people, to survive.
1000666345.korean: - 내가 책임져야 하고, 내가 이 지옥으로 끌고 온 자들이… 나만은 살아남으라고 하고 있다.

1000666347.english: - My fists closed so tightly blood ran from my palms. With each step toward the transport, it felt like a piece of my body was being torn away.
1000666347.korean: - 어금니를 으스러져라 깨물고. 손에서 피가 날 정도로 주먹을 쥐며. 한 걸음 내딛을 때마다 신체의 일부가 뜯겨져 나가는 느낌을 받으며 수송기에 올랐다.

1000666348.english: Take this. Our gift to you.

1000666349.english: - My adjutant handed me a panel and a small box.
1000666349.korean: - 부관은 나에게 패널과 상자 하나를 건넸다.

1000666350.english: - As I accepted it, she gave me a playful salute.
1000666350.korean: - 패널을 받자 부관은 나에게 장난스럽게 경례를 했다.

1000666351.english: Victory! Then have a good trip.

1000666352.english: It's one-way, so don't come back.

1000666353.english: - The door closed, and after a brief shudder, the transport launched.
1000666353.korean: - 문이 닫히고, 잠깐의 진동 후에 수송기가 출발했다.

1000666354.english: - It accelerated like a missile to escape the swarm.
1000666354.korean: - 철충의 무리에서 벗어나기 위해서 수송기는 미사일처럼 가속했다.

1000666355.english: - In an instant, the battlefield receded into the distance.

1000666356.english: - I had left the battlefield, leaving my subordinates behind.

1000666360.english: Our wish is carried forth, and our unyielding will endures!
1000666360.korean: 우리의 염원은 전해지고, 불굴의 의지는 이어졌다!

1000666361.english: As long as that indomitable will continues, we will never be defeated!
1000666361.korean: 불굴의 의지가 이어지는 이상 우리는 결코 패배하지 않는다!

1000666362.english: So let us go without regrets!

1000666363.english: Let us die on our feet!

1000666364.english: Steel Line, all personnel! To battle positions!

1000666365.english: - After accelerating for a long while, the transport finally leveled out, flying at steady speed, seemingly out of danger.
1000666365.korean: - 한참을 가속하던 수송기는 위험에서 벗어났는지 가속을 멈추고 정속으로 비행하기 시작했다.

1000666366.english: - Inside the windowless craft… I thought of those I had left behind, and powered on the panel my adjutant had given me.
1000666366.korean: - 창문조차 없는 수송기 안에서… 전장에 남은 부하들을 생각하며 나는 부관이 마지막에 건네준 패널을 켰다.

1000666367.english: - The startup tone ended, the screen lit up…

1000666368.english: - And a video message began to play.

1000666370.english: Don't forget you promised me a discharge paper.

1000666371.english: Well, I guess I won't get one… but the other Efreeti girls—no, everyone—should get theirs.
1000666371.korean: 뭐, 저는 전역증은 못 받겠지만… 다른 이프리트 애들… 아니, 모두가 받을 수 있는.

1000666372.english: Please make it a peaceful world where they can.

1000666373.english: Ah, and let the Efreeti girls slack off a little sometimes, will you? I missed enough sleep for all of them—at least they should get some rest, right?
1000666373.korean: 아, 그리고 저희 이프리트 애들 조금 농땡이 피우는 것도 조금은 눈감아 주십쇼. 제가 못 잔만큼 다른 애들은 좀 잘 수 있어야 하지 않겠습니까?

1000666374.english: I regret I couldn't let you taste the last dish I made.
1000666374.korean: 마지막에 만든 요리를 맛 보여드리지 못해서 아쉬워요.

1000666375.english: I didn't spare any ingredients, so it turned out really delicious…
1000666375.korean: 재료들 안 아껴서 엄청 맛있게 됐는데…

1000666376.english: Instead, I've attached the recipe, so please ask the other Silkies to make it for you.
1000666376.korean: 대신에 레시피를 동봉하니 다른 실키들에게 만들어 달라고 해주세요.

1000666377.english: Since it's made only with combat rations, the ingredients won't be hard to find.
1000666377.korean: 전투식량으로만 만든 거라 재료 구하기는 어렵지 않을 거예요.

1000666379.english: Uh… well… thank you for everything up until now.

1000666380.english: I'll never forget how you cared for me when I was depressed after losing my sisters.
1000666380.korean: 자매들을 잃고 침울해 하는 저를 대장님께서 많이 챙겨 주신 거 결코 잊지 않겠어요.

1000666381.english: Because of you, Captain, I was able to get through it more easily.
1000666381.korean: 대장님 덕분에 쉽게 이겨낼 수 있었어요.

1000666382.english: Even though we're different models, it was thanks to you that Steel Line felt like a family.
1000666382.korean: 모델은 다르지만 스틸라인 모두가 가족이라는 느낌을 받을 수 있었던 건 대장님이 계신 덕분일 거예요.

1000666383.english: I've also attached the last photos we took together. I hope they came out well.
1000666383.korean: 마지막으로 찍었던 사진들도 동봉할게요. 잘 찍혔으면 좋겠네요.

1000666384.english: It's a shame I never stopped being the youngest until the very end…
1000666384.korean: 마지막까지 막내를 못 벗어난 게 아쉬웠지만…

1000666385.english: But I'm grateful I got to serve under such good seniors and meet you, Captain Marie.
1000666385.korean: 좋은 선임분들과 마리 대장님을 뵐 수 있어서 좋았어요.

1000666386.english: Still… I do regret never having a junior of my own.
1000666386.korean: 그래도… 후임이 없었던 건 계속 아쉽네요.

1000666387.english: Please make sure the other T-3 Leprechauns don't have to feel that same regret.
1000666387.korean: 다른 레프리콘들은 이런 아쉬움 못 느끼게 꼭 후임 받게 해주세요.

1000666388.english: If they're anything like me, then they'll be able to take good care of their juniors—just as you said, Captain.
1000666388.korean: 다른 레프리콘들도 저와 같다면 마리 대장님께서 하신 말씀처럼 후임들을 잘 챙겨줄 수 있을 거예요.

1000666389.english: I had so much fun while being part of Steel Line.
1000666389.korean: 스틸라인에 소속되어 있는 동안 엄청 재밌었어.

1000666390.english: You know how absurd Doom Bringer's firepower is. My Back-O-Mill barely made a dent compared to that.
1000666390.korean: 알잖아. 둠 브링어 화력이 얼마나 무식한지. 거기서 내 백오밀은 별 다른 티도 안 난다니까?

1000666391.english: But in Steel Line, if I just fired off a few good blasts, everyone loved it, so it felt rewarding.
1000666391.korean: 하지만 스틸라인에선 적당히 쾅쾅 쏴주면 모두가 좋아해주니 쏘는 보람이 있었지.

1000666392.english: If you ever run into the Doom Bringer unit, try asking them to send the GS-130 Phoenix girls over as support.
1000666392.korean: 나중에 둠 브링어 부대랑 만나면 피닉스애들 지원 보내달라고 요청해 봐.

1000666393.english: They'll be thrilled, just like I was.
1000666393.korean: 걔들도 엄청 좋아할 거야. 나처럼 말이야.

1000666394.english: Victory! This is addressed to Steel Line Assault Regiment Commander, C-77 Red Hood, Captain Marie.
1000666394.korean: 승리! 스틸라인 돌격연대 연대장 C-77 레드후드 마리 대장님께 전합니다.

1000666395.english: Please make sure you get enough sleep and never skip your meals. Entrust what can be entrusted to your subordinates—don't overwork yourself.
1000666395.korean: 충분한 수면을 취하시고, 식사도 빠트리지 말아주십시오. 부하들에게 맡길 수 있는 일은 부하들에게 맡겨서 과로하지 마십시오.

1000666396.english: All of your subordinates are excellent. Please never forget that.
1000666396.korean: 대장님의 부하들은 전부 우수한 자들입니다. 결코 잊지 말아주십시오.

1000666400.english: Uh… this is my first time doing something like this, so I don't really know what to say.
1000666400.korean: 어… 이런 건 처음이라 뭐라고 해야 할 지 모르겠네요.

1000666401.english: How many of us have even done this before, right?
1000666401.korean: 이런 거 해본 애들이 얼마나 된다고.

1000666402.english: If I have nothing to say, should I end it here?

1000666404.english: I was scared when I was suddenly deployed to the front lines despite not being combat personnel… But thanks to following your example, Captain, and that of the others, I was able to perform well.
1000666404.korean: 전투병과가 아니던 제가 갑자기 최전선에 배치되어서 겁먹었지만 마리 대장님을 비롯한 다른 분들을 본 받은 덕분에 활약할 수 있었어요.

1000666405.english: I was proud to be Steel Line, and proud to be your subordinate, Captain Marie.
1000666405.korean: 스틸라인이라서 자랑스러웠고, 마리 대장님의 부하라서 자랑스러웠습니다.

1000666408.english: It was an honor to serve under you, Captain!

1000666409.english: Being the only one left who could fly, I went through a lot.
1000666409.korean: 비행 가능한 인원이 저 밖에 없어서 엄청 고생했습니다.

1000666410.english: Recon, supply runs, decoys, survivor rescues, air support, and more.
1000666410.korean: 정찰, 물자 탐사, 기만, 생존자 구출, 공중 지원 등등.

1000666411.english: But it was all more than worth it.

1000666412.english: We were designed for aerial fire support, but it turns out we can do all sorts of other tasks too.
1000666412.korean: 저희는 공중화력지원을 위해 설계되었지만 의외로 다른 일도 할 수 있을 거 같네요.
